business_description.nature_of_business: General contracting for commercial and institutional construction — healthcare facilities, educational buildings, and corporate offices throughout Western Pennsylvania

coverages_discussed.notes: Form Number WC 00 00 04. Includes Employers Liability with $1,000,000 limits for EL Each Accident, EL Disease Policy, and EL Disease Each.

positives: Experience Modification Factor of 0.86 indicates below-average loss experience relative to industry
Waiver of Subrogation endorsement in place
Alternate Employer Endorsement included for leased/assigned employees
All States Endorsement provides broad geographic coverage
Terrorism Risk Insurance Act Endorsement included
concerns: Construction operations across multiple trades including carpentry, electrical, plumbing, masonry, and painting — inherently high-risk work classifications
Masonry (code 5022) carries the highest rate at 9.15 with a 'G' (governing) classification
Significant estimated annual remuneration across multiple high-hazard classification codes
risk_highlights.loss_history_summary: Experience Modification Factor of 0.86 suggests favorable loss history relative to industry average.

extracted_text_sections.executive_summary: Workers Compensation and Employers Liability Insurance Policy issued by Hallmark Insurance Group to Keystone Commercial Builders, Inc. Policy Number WC-KCB-2025-5580, effective 08/01/2025 to 08/01/2026. Total premium of $1,158,173.43. Produced by Steel City Insurance Group.
extracted_text_sections.operations_description: SIC Code 1521 — General contracting for commercial and institutional construction including healthcare facilities, educational buildings, and corporate offices throughout Western Pennsylvania. Classification codes include: Carpentry NOC (5403), Electrical Wiring (5190), Plumbing NOC (5183), Masonry NOC (5022), Painting Interior (5474), Contractors Project Manager/Superintendent (5606), and Clerical Office Employees NOC (8810).
